current: CourtSMS.objects.select_related(...).get(id=sms_id)
suggestion: 此方法由 async API 通过 sync_to_async 包装调用（见 court_sms_api.py:90），当前方案可接受。若未来迁移到全异步，改为 CourtSMS.objects.select_related(...).aget(id=sms_id)。
impact: 当前已通过 sync_to_async 正确包装，优先级低

current: CourtSMS.objects.create(...)
suggestion: 由 async API 通过 sync_to_async 包装调用，当前方案可接受。

current: CaseAssignment.objects.select_related('lawyer').filter(...) 和 Lawyer.objects.exclude(...)
suggestion: 此方法在同步 worker 上下文中调用（Django-Q task），同步 ORM 是正确的。若迁移到异步 worker 需改为 async ORM。
impact: 同步 worker 上下文，当前无阻塞问题

current: CaseFolderBinding.objects.filter(case_id=case_id).first()
suggestion: 由同步 worker 调用，当前可接受。

suggestion: 同步 worker 上下文中的文件写入，当前可接受。若改为异步 worker，用 aiofiles。
impact: 同步 worker 上下文，优先级低

current: shutil.copy2(file_path, target_path)
suggestion: 同步 worker 上下文中的文件复制，当前可接受。

current: 同步方法调用 chat_service.get_or_create_chat() 和 send_document_notification()，涉及多平台 HTTP API 调用（飞书/钉钉/企微/Telegram）
suggestion: 此方法在同步 worker 中被调用，但内部进行多次 HTTP 调用。已有 async 版本 asend_case_chat_notification。建议 worker 调用路径也使用 asyncio.run() + async 版本，避免同步 HTTP 阻塞。
impact: 每次 SMS 处理涉及多平台 HTTP 调用，同步等待会增加 worker 占用时间

current: with open(file_path, 'rb') as file: ... httpx.post(url, files=files, ...)",suggestion":"同步 httpx.post 调用。该类已有 async 版本 _aupload_media（line 170）使用 aiofiles + httpx.AsyncClient。建议同步版 send_file 也标记为 deprecated，统一使用 async 版本。","impact":"钉钉文件上传是同步 HTTP 调用，阻塞 worker 线程"},{"file":"backend/apps/automation/services/chat/_feishu_file_mixin.py","line":87,"function":"_upload_file","category":"sync_http","severity":"P1","current":"with open(file_path, 'rb') as file: ... httpx.post(url, headers=headers, files=files, ...)",suggestion":"同步 httpx.post 调用。该类已有 async 版本 _aupload_file（line 211）。建议统一使用 async 版本。","impact":"飞书文件上传是同步 HTTP 调用，阻塞 worker 线程"},{"file":"backend/apps/automation/services/chat/_telegram_file_mixin.py","line":82,"function":"_send_document","category":"sync_http","severity":"P1","current":"with open(file_path, 'rb') as file: ... httpx.post(url, data=data, files=files, ...)",suggestion":"同步 httpx.post 调用。该类已有 async 版本 _asend_document（line 123）。建议统一使用 async 版本。","impact":"Telegram 文件发送是同步 HTTP 调用，阻塞 worker 线程"},{"file":"backend/apps/automation/services/chat/_wechat_work_file_mixin.py","line":72,"function":"_upload_temp_material","category":"sync_http","severity":"P1","current":"with open(file_path, 'rb') as file: ... httpx.post(url, headers=headers, files=files, ...)",suggestion":"同步 httpx.post 调用。该类已有 async 版本 _aupload_temp_material（line 175）。建议统一使用 async 版本。","impact":"企业微信文件上传是同步 HTTP 调用，阻塞 worker 线程"},{"file":"backend/apps/automation/services/chat/retry_config.py","line":369,"function":"execute_with_retry","category":"sync_sleep","severity":"P1","current":"time.sleep(delay)
suggestion: 重试等待使用 time.sleep，会阻塞线程。该类已有 async 版本 async_execute_with_retry（line 393）使用 asyncio.sleep。建议调用方统一使用 async 版本。
impact: 重试场景下 time.sleep 会阻塞 worker 线程数秒到数十秒

current: subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) — LibreOffice conversion blocks the thread for up to 60 seconds
suggestion: Wrap in asyncio.create_subprocess_exec() for async execution, or ensure callers use asyncio.to_thread()
impact: Long-running subprocess blocks the event loop if called from async context

current: Multiple file I/O operations: tempfile.mkstemp(), shutil.move(), file writes for PDF conversion
suggestion: Ensure this function is always called via asyncio.to_thread() from async contexts
impact: File I/O operations can block event loop for several seconds

current: EvidenceList.objects.filter(pk=self.list_id).update(...) — synchronous ORM update called repeatedly during merge progress
suggestion: Use bulk_update() with less frequent updates, or batch progress reporting
impact: Frequent synchronous ORM calls during PDF merge can slow down progress reporting

current: pdf_service.merge_evidence_files(evidence_list, progress_callback=on_progress) — CPU-intensive PDF merge operation
suggestion: Already wrapped in transaction.atomic(), but ensure callers use asyncio.to_thread() for the entire merge() method
impact: PDF merge is CPU-intensive and can block the event loop for 10-60+ seconds

current: doc = DocxTemplate(template_path); doc.save(buffer) — synchronous docx file read and write
suggestion: Already has async wrapper (export_evidence_list_with_template_async) using asyncio.to_thread()
impact: docx rendering can take 1-5 seconds for complex templates

current: response = self._llm_service.complete(prompt=prompt, ...) — synchronous LLM HTTP call that can take 30+ seconds
suggestion: Already has async wrapper (analyze_template_async) using asyncio.to_thread(), but LLM call itself should be async if possible
impact: LLM HTTP calls block the thread for 10-30 seconds, wasting event loop capacity

current: doc = Document(str(template_path)); doc.save(str(output_abs)) — synchronous docx file operations
suggestion: Already has async wrapper (fill_template_async) using asyncio.to_thread()
impact: File I/O operations take 1-3 seconds

current: llm_response = self.llm_service.chat(messages=messages) — synchronous LLM HTTP call with retry logic (up to 3 attempts)
suggestion: Callers already use asyncio.to_thread(), but LLM backend should support native async (httpx.AsyncClient)
impact: Each LLM call blocks for 5-30 seconds, with retries can block for up to 90 seconds

current: fitz.open(file_path) + page.get_text() — synchronous PDF text extraction from potentially large files (up to 200K chars)
suggestion: Already has async wrapper (extract_async) using asyncio.to_thread()
impact: Large PDF extraction can take 2-10 seconds

current: backend.chat(messages=messages, ...) — synchronous Ollama HTTP call with 60s timeout
suggestion: Ensure Ollama backend supports async, or wrap in asyncio.to_thread()
impact: Ollama inference can take 10-60 seconds

current: response = self._llm_service.complete(prompt=user_message, ...) — synchronous LLM HTTP call with retry (3 attempts)
suggestion: SmartFillService lacks async wrapper; add async _call_llm_async() using native async LLM client
impact: LLM calls block for 10-30 seconds per attempt, up to 90 seconds total

current: renderer.render(template_path, context) — synchronous docx template rendering
suggestion: Add async wrapper using asyncio.to_thread() for the render method
impact: docx rendering can take 1-3 seconds

current: content = DocxRenderer().render(file_location, context) — synchronous docx template rendering + potential file I/O for folder binding
suggestion: API layer already uses sync_to_async(), but service could provide native async method
impact: docx rendering + file save can take 2-5 seconds

current: Multiple docx renders + ZIP creation + file I/O for folder extraction
suggestion: API layer already uses sync_to_async(), but service could provide native async method for better concurrency
impact: Folder generation with multiple documents can take 10-30 seconds

current: doc = DocxTemplate(str(template_path)); doc.save(buffer) — synchronous docx rendering
suggestion: API layer already uses sync_to_async(), service is fine for now

current: default_storage.save(rel_path, file) + docx parsing — synchronous file I/O

current: get_pdf_page_count(file, default=1) — synchronous PDF page count extraction
suggestion: Low priority; PDF page count is usually fast (<100ms)

current: root.rglob('*.docx') — synchronous directory traversal

current: Multiple cache.get() + ORM queries — synchronous cache and database operations
